buildCommand: rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && bun run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cloud.umami.is; connect-src 'self' https://cloud.umami.is; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; worker-src 'self' blob:
